mnemonics: Chalk and Talk: Cows Love Toate Hops
PowerPoint: Press Once, Print Everywhere Daily
keyPoints: Introduction (10-15 minutes): Clearly define the topic, establish rapport with the audience, and set the learning objectives.
Explanation (30-40 minutes): Use the chalk and talk method to explain the theory, provide examples, and clarify any doubts.
Practice (20-30 minutes): Use PowerPoint presentations to demonstrate the application of the theory, provide exercises, and check the understanding of the audience.
Example 1 (15-20 minutes): Use a simple example to illustrate the concept, explain the payoffs, and show the Nash equilibrium.
Example 2 (15-20 minutes): Use a more complex example to demonstrate the application of the theory, explain the strategies, and show the game tree.
Conclusion (5-10 minutes): Summarize the key points, answer any remaining questions, and provide resources for further learning.
